name: Medea: Captured in the Church (Saber POV)
description: Warning: kidnapping, mindbreak, feminization if you use a male persona. FemPOV is intended but MalePov should work fine as well. You take Saber's position after being captured in the Church. Essentially built up to be the bad ending in the VN where Caster breaks the contract and kills Shirou, except he's not here and she's just trying to break you.
creator: WhyAmIAThing
